codeReview.summary: 17 well-structured tests covering all 10 SettingsManager methods. Tests follow project conventions (colocated __tests__, localStorage.clear() in beforeEach, clear arrange/act/assert pattern). All 10 assertions (VAL-SETTINGS-001 through VAL-SETTINGS-010) are fully covered with both happy paths and edge cases (corrupted JSON, write failures, missing keys, reset when empty). Tests verified passing (17/17) with full suite (133 total). No console.log statements in test file; error console output comes from the source code's catch blocks which is expected.

summary: Comprehensive test coverage for settingsManager.js. All 10 assertions fully verified across 17 tests covering getSettings (defaults, parse, corrupted data recovery), saveSettings (persist + lastModified, write failure), getSetting (hit + miss), updateSetting (merge + preserve), resetSettings (remove + no-op), getDashboardConfig/saveDashboardConfig (null default, save, retrieve), and getResourcesPath/saveResourcesPath (null default, save, retrieve). Code quality is high with clear test naming, proper isolation via beforeEach, and good assertion specificity. Worker followed the test-worker skill procedure exactly.
